about_item: LESS SPILL: The wide bottom and small opening design minimizes spills and messes during travel, while the tapered lip prevents water splashes caused by car movement.

ULTRA STABILITY: Our portable travel bowl features a tapered shape that offers an exceptionally low center of gravity, ensuring unparalleled stability in most situations. Say goodbye to tipping over when you take your beloved pet on the go.

FOLDABLE: This collapsible silicone dog bowl effortlessly folds and maintains its sturdy structure when opened, making it perfect for hiking and travel. It serves as an excellent daily companion for pets.
Dimenson: 6*6*2.3inch, height 0.7inch when folded, each bowl has a generous capacity of up to 24oz for food or water, catering perfectly to the needs of large dogs.
DO NOT allow your pet to play with the bowl as the silicone material is food safe but can be easily torn by curious teeth.

summary.text: Customers find the water bowl effective at preventing spills and appreciate its size, being suitable for larger dogs. Moreover, the bowl is sturdy with a stable base and works well in various settings, including boats and outdoor activities. However, the foldability receives mixed feedback - while some say it collapses nicely, others find it hard to collapse. Additionally, water retention is also mixed, with customers noting that while it keeps water in during travel, it can be difficult to remove excess water.

insights.title: Spill resistance
insights.summary: Customers generally find the water bowl effective at preventing spills, though some report that it spills water everywhere. One customer notes that 8oz is the best size to minimize splashing.

examples.snippet: ...They hold the water inside the bowl while on the road, so no spills. The carabiner is a handy addition when hiking and the bowl is collapsed.

authors_reviews.title: These are great water bowls for travel, hiking, and camping
authors_reviews.text: These are great dog bowls. They get narrower at the top, instead of at the bottom like many other collapsible dog bowls. This makes them for stabble and travel well. I think it also helps keep the water in the. bowl as the dog drinks. I have left mine in the dog kennel and on the floorboard,with water in it, and there are no spills. The 34 oz is suitable for larger dogs. Collapsing or extending the bowl is easy.
authors_reviews.author: DIRRanch

authors_reviews.title: Driving bowl
authors_reviews.text: Amazing for drives, just don’t fill more than half full when car is moving. Base is nice and stable since it’s wider. Curved lip helps prevent spill over.
authors_reviews.author: Tuna

authors_reviews.title: good collapsible dog bowl for traveling
authors_reviews.text: I am pleased with this purchase. The bowl, when expanded , is sturdy and holds enough water for our two medium size dogs to get a good drink. We use the small one in the car and the large one in the RV while traveling.They hold the water inside the bowl while on the road, so no spills. The carabiner is a handy addition when hiking and the bowl is collapsed.
authors_reviews.author: Cac

authors_reviews.title: Good to take on long walks or hikes
authors_reviews.text: I have an 80 lb doggo so I bought the larger collapsible, no spill water bowl. Its about the size of a golf disc. It worked great during a recent walkabout (first use). The larger opening is ideal for my dog and encouraged him to drink his fill. The base is wide and sturdy and tapers towards the top where the lip curves in slightly for no spillability. Because the bowl is flexible material and collapses easily we worried that it could collapse and spill in the car during road trips if it were laid or rolled on, so we opted for a different travel bowl for car travel, one that is hard plastic with a no spill lid. We'll use this flexible bowl for all other times. Overall, it's a very good bowl and we are happy we bought it.
authors_reviews.author: Diamond MB

authors_reviews.title: Easy collapsable and non spillable dog dishes.
authors_reviews.text: These dishes worked perfectly on a week's vacation. I bought 2 for food and water. No spills and no collapsing. Some reviews said they were hard to collapse after use. However, I found them very easy once you discovered the technique. I'd buy again and recommend them. They were large enough for my golden retriever.
authors_reviews.author: Jack

authors_reviews.title: Very human friendly pet bowl
authors_reviews.text: love this collapsing dog bowl! easy to use & clean. doesn't tip over on the back seat of the car and holds ample supply of water for the pooch. GREAT product !!!
authors_reviews.author: jax max man

authors_reviews.title: Good but not great.
authors_reviews.text: I looked at lots of collapsible water bowls for my dogs and somehow decided on this one. I didn’t think about the different way it collapses- Top to bottom. It is a bit annoying to clean and sometimes takes a few tries to get it to completely collapse. It holds water fine and gets the job done. Comes with a small carabiner and travels well as it is a very soft rubber materiel. I will use it for now but when I lose it or it becomes unusable from wear and tear I will look into another brand. Works but not my favorite.
authors_reviews.author: wlarson

authors_reviews.title: Really IS SPILL PROOF
authors_reviews.text: True to its advertising - spill proof.I use this in my car for long trips.I was going 55mph and needed to brake hard. Things in the car ended in disarray.This bowl - stayed in place and didn’t loose a drop of water. The bowl was just under half full.Getting another for my daughter’s dog.
authors_reviews.author: CMKellyMN

other_countries_reviews.title: Great Travel Buy
other_countries_reviews.text: Perfect for camping and very stable. This bowl won't tip over if it gets moved. Good for water or food. Collapses easily, compact and lightweight for carrying. Would definitely recommend for travel.
other_countries_reviews.author: Good to Know

other_countries_reviews.title: Praktisch zum mitnehmen
other_countries_reviews.text: Mein Labrador hat es aber schon kapput gebissen 👀
other_countries_reviews.author: Vitoria

other_countries_reviews.title: Perfect Travel Bowl – No Spills, No Mess!
other_countries_reviews.text: Excellent portable water bowl!The first thing that caught my eye was the colour and clever design — it’s made to stay upright and prevent spills when carried around. Both promises were delivered perfectly!I use it daily on the first level (my toy poodle doesn’t need 700 ml of water), and even when I move the crate around, not a single drop has spilt.Just a small tip: be careful how you hold it when filling it at the sink, as the bottom bends slightly under the weight of the water. However, if you place it on the floor first and then fill it up, it works exactly as intended.It has become our new must-have item for dog school days!
other_countries_reviews.author: Anze

other_countries_reviews.title: Super Napf, steht stabil
other_countries_reviews.text: Super Produkt!Sieht gut aus und steht stabil. Wir hatten ihn über 1000 Kilometer am Boden im Auto stehen und es ist nichts übergeschwappt.Sehr empfehlenswert.
other_countries_reviews.author: Tanne
